args.claim: Tavily offers three main APIs for AI agents: a Search API (AI-focused web search with scraping and optional LLM-generated responses), an Extract API (scrape and extract data from up to 20 URLs per call), and a Crawl API (map and crawl domains).
args.quote: Tavily is a set of APIs built for AI agents... We currently offer three main APIs: Search, Extract, and Crawl. The Search API is an AI-focused search engine that includes scraping and optional LLM-generated responses. The Extract API lets you scrape and extract data from up to 20 URLs per call. The Crawl API allows you to map and crawl entire domains.
